messages.content: hello can you give me similar song to Journey - Separate Ways (Worlds Apart)

Yes, here are a few similar songs to Journey's "Separate Ways" (Worlds apart):

1. "My Heart Will Go On" by The Heart
2. "First Time Ever I saw Your Love" by U2
3. "Don't Stop Believin'" by Journey
4. "I Will Always Love You" by Whitney Houston
5. "I Will Always Love You" by Fleetwood Mac
6. "Stairway to Heaven" by Led Zeppelin
7. "The Chain" by Fleetwood Mac
8. "Don't Stop Believin'" (tour version) by Journey

Please note that these are just a few examples, and there are many other songs that could be similar to "Journey's Separate Ways". You may want to consider listening to a wide variety of songs to find the perfect one for you.

If you're looking for a similar sound to "Journey's Separate Ways", then here are a few other songs that could be worth listening to:

1. "Lover" by The Red Hot Chili Peppers

8. "Candy Shop" by Fleetwood Mac
9. "Bohemian Rhapsody" by Queen

Please note that these are just a few examples, and there are many other songs that could have a similar sound to your liking. You may want to consider listening to a wide variety of music to find the perfect song for you.
